items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the scenario of individual cancellation within a group.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the behavior of individual cancellations within a group booking context. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or traces related to the cancellation scenario described. The linked use case outlines the cascading effects of cancellations but does not provide concrete evidence of the scenario being tested, leading to an inconclusive result.
